title: SpecRunnerSpecFrontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter of a gated spec document (spec/{requirements,design,tasks}.md), serialized by spec_runner.spec.SpecMeta. The spec-runner-vscode extension reads this directly for governance state. additionalProperties is false so a new SpecMeta field trips the contract test. See src/spec_runner/spec.py.

spec_stage.description: Which gated stage this document is

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 generation timestamp, empty when unset

source_prompt_version.description: Content-hash version of the generation prompt template

validation.description: Cached validation verdict. CACHE ONLY — refreshed by `spec check`/`spec approve`, not by manual edits.

approved_by.description: Approver identity, or null when not approved

approved_at.description: ISO-8601 approval timestamp, or null when not approved
